description: AtlantisSpace (AS) is the official token for the world’s FIRST satellite-based space node system dedicated to AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 public blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time. It extends DeFi, block data, and AI contract finality from Earth into space and gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract support, driving it forward with unmatched momentum throughout the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: AtlantisSpace
